data.bannerDescription: We use essential cookies to keep the site working and optional cookies to understand usage and improve the experience.
data.settingsDescription: Choose which optional cookies you allow. Essential cookies are always active.
data.essentialDescription: Required for core site functionality, security, and consent persistence.

seo.title: Gain International Patients | Global Clinic Visibility Platform
seo.description: Gain international patients through a trusted comparison platform. Increase clinic reach, visibility, and qualified global patient inquiries.

hero.title: Clinic Comparison Turkey for Aesthetic Treatments
hero.description: Compare selected aesthetic clinics in Turkey in a transparent and structured way. Our platform helps you understand treatment options, review clinic information and contact clinics directly with confidence.

testimonials.quote: The platform makes treatment research easier by structuring clinic details around what patients need before deciding.
testimonials.author: Maya Bennett

testimonials.quote: I appreciate how trust signals are integrated into the comparison flow instead of being hidden in long profile text.
testimonials.author: Daniel Ortega

testimonials.quote: For users planning treatment abroad, the direct contact step is clear, practical, and aligned with real decision journeys.
testimonials.author: Sophie Klein

testimonialsIntro.title: Expert feedback
testimonialsIntro.description: Perspectives from healthcare and product experts who reviewed the patient decision flow.

categoriesIntro.title: Categories
categoriesIntro.description: Explore verified clinics by specialty and compare the best options for your needs.

features.title: Benefits for Patients
features.description: Compare verified clinics for dental care, hair transplants, and aesthetic treatments with clear trust signals and transparent profile data.

items.title: Qualified Leads
items.description: Compare aesthetic clinics based on treatments, specializations and qualifications. All information is presented clearly to support informed decision making.

items.title: Reputation Boost
items.description: Clinics create and manage their own profiles and provide relevant qualifications according to their aesthetic services. This ensures reliable and comparable information.

items.title: Visibility Increase
items.description: Patients contact clinics directly without intermediaries, obligations or hidden fees.

process.title: How It Works for Patients
process.subtitle: A transparent onboarding flow from profile setup to verified visibility and direct patient inquiries.

steps.title: Reach Out
steps.description: You contact us and receive a clear overview of how the platform works, including visibility options, regions, and patient demand.

steps.title: Finalize Profile
steps.description: Clinics create and manage their own profiles. This ensures full control over medical information, treatments offered, languages, expertise, and international patient services presented clearly for patient comparison.

steps.title: Verification & Quality Check
steps.description: Clinics are required to provide relevant qualifications and certifications according to their medical services. This verification process ensures credibility, transparency, and a high-quality environment for international patients.

steps.title: Connect with Patients
steps.description: Qualified international patients contact your clinic directly through the platform, ready to discuss treatments, and next steps.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: This section answers the most common questions clinics and medical networks have about gaining international patients through our comparison platform.

items.question: How does this platform help clinics gain international patients?
items.answer: By combining global visibility, patient guidance, and quality-focused clinic presentation in one trusted comparison environment.

items.question: Are the patient inquiries exclusive?
items.answer: Inquiries are handled according to your clinic profile settings and availability.

items.question: Which countries and regions are covered?
items.answer: Coverage depends on active campaigns and regional demand at the time of listing.

items.question: Is this platform suitable for clinic groups and networks?
items.answer: Yes. Groups can maintain consistent branding while showcasing individual locations.

items.question: Are patient inquiries focused on Europe?
items.answer: Demand is strongest across Europe, but can include other regions depending on campaigns.

testimonials.quote: The clinic onboarding model is well structured and sets clear expectations for profile quality and international visibility.
testimonials.author: Alex Morgan

testimonials.quote: I like that the positioning is not lead-reselling but direct patient contact supported by transparent clinic information.

testimonials.quote: From an operations perspective, the process is practical: present verified strengths, compare clearly, and move into qualified conversations.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Choose the monthly tier that matches your growth stage. Performance-based commission and optional add-ons sit alongside the subscription model.

plans.description: For clinics that want stronger category visibility, a more competitive profile presence, and a reliable stream of qualified international inquiries.

highlights.text: Built for clinics scaling inbound demand

plans.description: For established clinics and networks that need the strongest presentation, highest visibility, and a structure ready for more active international growth.
A focused entry plan for clinics that want to get listed, present core strengths clearly, and start testing international demand without a heavy commitment.

pricingModel.title: Monthly subscription tiers
pricingModel.description: Basic, Premium, and Pro cover ongoing visibility, profile management, and partner presence.

pricingModel.title: Performance-based commission
pricingModel.description: A variable fee can apply on successful patient cases, separate from the monthly subscription.

pricingModel.title: Optional add-ons
pricingModel.description: Extra visibility or support modules can be added without bloating the base pricing cards.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: This section answers the most common questions clinics and medical networks have about gaining international patients through our comparison platform. It provides clarity on regions, qualifications, visibility and how clinics connect with international patients across the DACH region and Europe.

items.question: How does this platform help clinics gain international patients?
items.answer: By combining global visibility, patient guidance, and quality-focused clinic presentation in one trusted comparison environment.

items.question: Are the patient inquiries exclusive?
items.answer: Patients contact clinics directly. There are no resold or recycled leads.

items.question: Which countries and regions are covered?
items.answer: Our primary focus is the DACH region (Germany, Austria, Switzerland), while also supporting international patient acquisition across Europe.

items.question: Is this platform suitable for clinic groups and networks?
items.answer: Yes. We support single clinics, clinic groups, and medical networks with scalable visibility options.

items.question: Are patient inquiries focused on Europe?
items.answer: Most inquiries originate from patients seeking treatment within Europe, with a strong focus on the DACH region.

seo.title: About findmydoc | The team behind clearer clinic decisions
seo.description: Meet the team behind findmydoc and learn how we make clinic information clearer, more accountable, and easier to compare.

hero.title: The team behind clearer clinic decisions.
hero.description: findmydoc helps patients compare clinic information with confidence and helps clinics present their services responsibly.

items.text: We bring clarity to clinic information so comparisons are fair and decisions are easier.
We hold clinic information accountable through verification and responsible presentation.
We keep the next step simple by connecting patients and clinics directly.

team.name: Volkan Kablan
team.whatWeDo: Shape finance and partner operations so clinic growth stays sustainable, measurable, and transparent.

team.name: Youssef Adlah
team.whatWeDo: Lead growth and partnerships to connect the right patients with the right clinics through clear communication and strong relationships.

team.name: Anil Gökduman
team.whatWeDo: Own product strategy and user experience to make clinic comparisons simple, relevant, and trustworthy for patients.

team.name: Özen Günes
team.whatWeDo: Ensure legal integrity, data protection, and responsible engagement across all our relationships with patients and clinics.

team.name: Sebastian Schütze
team.whatWeDo: Build and maintain a secure, reliable platform so clinic information is structured, up to date, and easy to access.

items.text: Qualification signals are reviewed before visibility.
